case_title: CHEW,ROY Y VS MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHEW,ROY Y AS TO DEFENDANT MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW,ROY Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-09-1993, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW,ROY Y IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MENDINILLA,BOYET RAINIER C/O DELTA DENTAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
